title: Editas Medicine (EDIT) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: Editas Medicine Stock Forecast and Analyst Ratings 2026. Price Target Summary: Consensus price target in the $5-7 range implies significant upside from current levels. High targets reach $12-15 under bull case scenarios. Low targets near $1-2 under bear case scenarios. Rating Distribution: Buy ratings: ~35-40% of analysts. Hold ratings: ~40-50% of analysts. Sell ratings: ~10-15% of analysts. Key Factors in Analyst Recommendations: Bull Case Support: Successful EDIT-401 clinical development. Large addressable market in hyperlipidemia. Differentiated mechanism vs other gene therapies. Patent protection through 2040+. Bear Case Concerns: Clinical execution risks remain high. Manufacturing challenges for ex vivo programs (reni-cel). Competitive intensity in gene therapy space. Regulatory pathway uncertainties for in vivo approaches. Base Case Scenario: Assumes: EDIT-401 advances on plan. Reni-cel successfully partnered. Baseline cash runway extends into mid-2027. Probability-weighted stock price could support $5-7 range. 2026 Key Catalysts: EDIT-401 IND submission (mid-2026). Clinical data presentations (various conferences). Partnership announcements potential. Quarterly cash burn updates.
